layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-24 for section padding.
layout.border_radius: Use full rounded for buttons (rounded-full). Use arch shapes for service cards (rounded-t-full rounded-b-md or rounded-t-[500px]).
layout.grids: Services section must use a 3x2 grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) with gap-8 or gap-12.

navigation.style: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-[#E6E0D7]/80) or solid oatmeal background (z-50). Centered Logo.
navigation.logo: Text 'Lightened Self' in Cormorant Garamond, text-2xl or 3xl.
navigation.links: HOME, WORK WITH ME (Dropdown), TOOLS (Dropdown), CONTACT. Use Poppins text-sm tracking-widest.
navigation.dropdowns: WORK WITH ME: 1:1 Virtual, 1:1 Mentorship, Couple Healing, Meditation, Aura Cleansing, Quick Energy Reset. TOOLS: Meditations, Programs.
navigation.cta: CLIENT LOGIN. Warm Terracotta (#B68D6D), rounded-full, Poppins.

hero.style: Large layered 'Organic Overlay' design. Arch-masked hero image. Soft radial glow (use absolute positioned divs with blur-3xl and Blush Pink/Sage Green colors behind the image).
hero.heading: Your Light, Unbound.

services_grid.style: 3x2 symmetrical grid of chic vertical arches.
services_grid.card_style: Arch shape (rounded-t-full). Image fills the top half of the arch. Content below.
services_grid.button: Book Now button linking to Zoho Bookings. Use #B68D6D text or background.

contact_section.style: Two column layout. Left text, right form.
contact_section.header: Small caps 'Get in Touch', large serif 'Contact'.
contact_section.left_column: Text: 'Let\'s start your healing journey'. Icons for Email, Response Time, Sessions.
contact_section.right_column: Clean rounded white contact form. Fields: Name, Email, Interested In (Dropdown), Message.

hero_image.alt: Sunlight streams through hanging plants at sunset

services.title: Couple Healing
services.description: Realign and reconnect with your partner.

services.title: Aura Cleansing
services.description: Clear energy blockages and restore balance.

services.title: Quick Energy Reset
services.description: A brief session to realign your energy.

interactions.hover: Smooth color transitions for buttons. Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow on service cards.
interactions.links: Underline animation on hover for navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Poppins' are imported via Google Fonts in the HTML or global CSS.
Use Tailwind arbitrary values perfectly to match the hex codes provided (e.g. bg-[#B68D6D]).
For the Services Grid, structure the cards with `rounded-t-full` or `rounded-t-[300px]` (or similar arch radius) to create the arch shape. Ensure `overflow-hidden` so images stay within the arch.

For the Hero Section, create an 'organic overlay' by combining an arch-masked image with absolute positioned, heavily blurred circular divs (blur-[100px] or blur-3xl) in Blush Pink (#E8D3C5) and Sage Green (#738062) to simulate a soft radial glow.
Ensure the sticky menu works nicely. The 'WORK WITH ME' and 'TOOLS' items should trigger dropdowns (can use Shadcn UI DropdownMenu or native relative/absolute hover implementations).
Add `id` to each major section (e.g., `id="home"`, `id="services"`, `id="contact"`) to allow smooth scrolling from the navigation menu. This mimics Carrd's Section Break functionality.
Ensure text contrast meets accessibility standards; use Dark Olive (#546142) text on Oatmeal and Blush backgrounds.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements: buttons, form inputs, navigation links.
Lucide-react icons to use: 'Mail' for email, 'Clock' for response time, 'MapPin' for sessions, 'Send' (paper plane) for the submit button.
